title: Solana Staking Snapshot
description: Query a Solana wallet's complete staking picture: native stake accounts (active, activating, deactivating, inactive) pulled from the on-chain stake program, plus liquid staking positions in mSOL (Marinade), jitoSOL (Jito), bSOL (Sanctum), and stSOL (Lido). Returns stake amount in SOL, activation epoch, estimated APY, and claimable rewards for each position — build a staking dashboard, rewards calculator, or unstaking automation agent in one view.
useCase: Build a Solana staking dashboard that aggregates native stake accounts and liquid staking positions (mSOL, jitoSOL, bSOL) with estimated APY and claimable rewards in one view.

keyParams.address: The Solana wallet address to snapshot staking positions for
keyParams.nft: Set to false to exclude NFTs and focus on fungible staking tokens
keyParams.no_spam: Set to true to filter spam tokens from the response
